Metadata.title: Óscar Folha | Software Engineer
Metadata.description: Premium multilingual portfolio for Óscar Folha, a software engineer focused on full-stack development, product quality, and collaborative delivery.

Hero.intro: Software engineer with strong technical and social skills. Ambitious, eager to learn, determined, self-critical but confident, and energized by teamwork, shared ideas, and constructive feedback.

About.title: A product-minded engineer who values technical rigor and healthy collaboration.
About.description: I enjoy solving problems across the stack, improving delivery quality, and helping teams work with more trust, clarity, and momentum.
About.quote: I enjoy teamwork and helping create a positive environment with constant exchange of ideas, support, and constructive feedback.
About.educationDegrees: Bachelor's and Master's in Computer Software Engineering
About.skillsTitle: Skills spanning product thinking, delivery, and engineering depth

Experience.title: A timeline shaped by production work and strong academic foundations.
Experience.description: From enterprise software delivery to advanced engineering studies, each step has strengthened how I design, communicate, and execute.

msglife.title: Software Engineer
msglife.summary: Contributing to software delivery in a professional engineering environment with a focus on reliability, collaboration, and continuous improvement.
points: Build and evolve software solutions with attention to maintainability and product quality.
Collaborate across teams, share feedback, and support healthy delivery practices.
Balance technical execution with clear communication and ownership.

masters.title: Master's in Computer Software Engineering
masters.summary: Advanced academic work focused on software engineering methods, architecture, and disciplined technical thinking.
points: Deepened knowledge in software architecture and development practices.
Strengthened analytical thinking and system-level problem solving.
Built a stronger foundation for complex engineering decisions.

bachelors.title: Bachelor's in Computer Software Engineering
bachelors.summary: A broad technical foundation covering programming, systems, teamwork, and engineering fundamentals.
points: Developed strong fundamentals in computer software engineering.
Worked on collaborative projects with practical delivery constraints.
Built the base for a full-stack engineering path.
